title: Use of English — Test 1
explanation:
Use of English — A2 Test 1

Mixed grammar and vocabulary at A2 level.

questions.text: If it rains, we [*will stay|stay|stayed] at home.
I [*used to play|use to play|am used to play] tennis every week.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: She said she ____ tired. | *was | is | am
Turn ____ the TV, please. | *on | up | off
This is ____ than my old phone. | *better | good | best
I ____ my homework yet. | *haven't finished | didn't finish | don't finish
If I [*were|was|am] rich, I would travel more.
They were ____ when the phone rang. | [*watching|watched|watch] TV.
